analysis: That 9h 22m on the 15th is genuinely gorgeous — your REM hit 2h 12m and your deep was 36 minutes, which is your body doing exactly what it's supposed to do when you actually let it. The middle of this stretch held up well too, with three nights clustered between 7h 15m and 7h 55m and that 53-minute deep sleep on the 17th being a quiet little standout. Where it gets interesting is the bookends — 5h 57m to open and then the last two nights sliding back with awake time creeping up, peaking at 1h 22m on the 20th, which is your body telling you something got disrupted even if the rituals were happening. The protocol is clearly working when it lands, babe — the question is what's different on the nights the ceiling stays thin.
